### JSON Assessment

```json
{
  "education": {
    "required": "Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field",
    "candidate": "BS in Computer Science from FAS, Graduation Year: 2026",
    "match": "yes",
    "notes": ""
  },
  "skills": {
    "required": [
      "Python",
      "R",
      "SQL",
      "Data Visualization tools (e.g., Matplotlib, Seaborn, Power BI, or Tableau)",
      "Machine Learning libraries (e.g., Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn)",
      "Git",
      "Cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, or Azure)",
      "Statistics and hypothesis testing"
    ],
    "candidate": [
      "Python",
      "Django",
      "Flask",
      "SQLite",
      "Git",
      "Communication",
      "Teamwork"
    ],
    "match": [
      "Python",
      "Git"
    ],
    "gap": [
      "R",
      "SQL",
      "Data Visualization tools (e.g., Matplotlib, Seaborn, Power BI, or Tableau)",
      "Machine Learning libraries (e.g., Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn)",
      "Cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, or Azure)",
      "Statistics and hypothesis testing"
    ]
  },
  "projects": [
    {
      "title": "Bike Renting (Time Series)",
      "tools_methods": [
        "XGBoost Regressor",
        "AWS SageMaker",
        "AWS Lambda",
        "API Gateway",
        "S3"
      ],
      "relevance_to_JD": "high"
    },
    {
      "title": "X-RAY Body Part Classifier",
      "tools_methods": [
        "TensorFlow",
        "CNN Classifier"
      ],
      "relevance_to_JD": "medium"
    }
  ],
  "experience": [
    {
      "title": "AI Intern",
      "domain_relevance": "relevant",
      "start_date": "2025-06",
      "end_date": "2025-08",
      "duration_years": "0.2"
    }
  ],
  "strengths": [
    "Experience as AI Intern",
    "Use of XGBoost Regressor and AWS SageMaker in Bike Renting (Time Series) project",
    "Use of TensorFlow in X-RAY Body Part Classifier project"
  ],
  "weaknesses": [
    "Lack of experience with R, SQL, Data Visualization tools, Machine Learning libraries, Cloud platforms, and Statistics and hypothesis testing",
    "No experience with deep learning frameworks (TensorFlow or PyTorch)"
  ],
  "overall_fit_score": "40"
}
```

### Notes

- The candidate has a relevant degree in Computer Science, but lacks experience in Data Science, Statistics, and Mathematics.
- The candidate has some programming skills, but lacks experience with R, SQL, and Data Visualization tools.
- The candidate has some experience with machine learning libraries, but lacks experience with Scikit-learn.
- The candidate has some experience with cloud platforms, but lacks experience with AWS, GCP, or Azure.
- The candidate has some experience with statistics and hypothesis testing, but lacks a deep understanding.
- The candidate has some experience with deep learning frameworks, but lacks experience with TensorFlow or PyTorch.
- The candidate has some experience with data visualization, but lacks experience with Matplotlib, Seaborn, Power BI, or Tableau.
- The candidate has some experience with Git, but lacks experience with version control systems.
- The candidate has some experience with machine learning, but lacks experience with model deployment and monitoring.
- The candidate has some experience with data analysis, but lacks experience with exploratory data analysis (EDA).
- The candidate has some experience with data visualization, but lacks experience with data visualization tools.
- The candidate has some experience with communication and teamwork, but lacks experience with critical thinking and problem-solving.
- The candidate has some experience with data science, but lacks experience with data-driven solutions and actionable insights.
- The candidate has some experience with machine learning, but lacks experience with model evaluation and deployment.
- The candidate has some experience with data analysis, but lacks experience with data visualization and communication.
- The candidate has some experience with data science, but lacks experience with data-driven solutions and actionable insights.
